boundary_check.method: point-in-polygon against LGD Assembly Constituency boundaries (Karnataka)

user_confirmed_constituency.note: House is ~700m OUTSIDE this polygon's southern edge.

boundary_check.caveat: LGD polygons are simplified (CV Raman Nagar outer ring = 71 vertices). The house sits near the CV Raman Nagar / Shanti Nagar / Mahadevapura junction. VERIFY on the ECI Voter Services portal (https://voters.eci.gov.in) before finalising the POC constituency.
boundary_check.current_dataset_targets: C.V. Raman Nagar (AC 161) - per user's explicit confirmation. Data in candidates.json / winning_party.json / sources/ describe AC 161, NOT AC 163.
